name: Kohl's Pizza Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and green pepper in olive oil until tender.
2. Siphon off excess oil if needed. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan.
3. Cook on medium heat until the oven is preheated to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Place 1/4 of the pizza sauce on an uncooked pizza crust.
5. Add desired pizza toppings such as pepperoni, sausage, hamburger, sliced black olives, etc.
6. Bake on the middle shelf until bubbly, about 12 minutes.
7. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese and grated mozzarella cheese over the pizza.
8. Return to oven for another 12 minutes, placing on the lower rack to brown the crust and melt the cheese.
9. If cooking more than one pizza, place the second pizza on the top middle shelf to begin cooking.
